MAESTRO-MISSED_ENTRANCE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Shuffle a [gold]Shame[/gold] into your draw pile.
MAESTRO-MISSED_ENTRANCE.title: Missed Entrance
MAESTRO-PAGE_FLIP.description: Draw {FirstDraw:diff()} {FirstDraw:plural:card|cards}. At the start of your next turn, draw {SecondDraw:diff()} {SecondDraw:plural:card|cards}.
MAESTRO-PAGE_FLIP.title: Page Flip
MAESTRO-FINALE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. If this kills an enemy, end your turn.
MAESTRO-FINALE.title: Finale
MAESTRO-BOWING_TECHNIQUE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Gain {DexterityPower:diff()} Dexterity this turn.
MAESTRO-BOWING_TECHNIQUE.title: Bowing Technique
MAESTRO-OFFBEAT.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. If this is the second card played this turn, gain 1 energy.
MAESTRO-OFFBEAT.title: Offbeat
MAESTRO-SUBITO_FORTE.title: Subito Forte
MAESTRO-STACCATO.title: Staccato
MAESTRO-COMMON_TIME.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat} times.
MAESTRO-COMMON_TIME.title: Common Time
MAESTRO-HESITATION.title: Hesitation
MAESTRO-LONG_TONES.description: Gain {Resonance:diff()} [gold]Resonance[/gold]. This card can be upgraded an infinite number of times.
MAESTRO-LONG_TONES.title: Long Tones
MAESTRO-PRACTICE_MAKES_PERFECT.descripti: Choose a card in your hand. Play it X{IfUpgraded:show:+1} times.
MAESTRO-PRACTICE_MAKES_PERFECT.title: Practice Makes Perfect
